bibliographic_info.title: Assessment of BDS-3 PPP-B2b Service and Its Applications for the Determination of Precipitable Water Vapour

Forstationsbetween 30◦ Nand48◦ N,themeanrootmeansquareerror(RMSE)ofZTDforthePPP-B2bsolutionwas approximately 15 mm compared to ZTD from the International GNSS Service (IGS).
